interface.longDescription: Codex Unity Agent Kit packages focused workflows for Unity project discovery, ASP.NET backend work, planning, cross-agent teamwork, safe C# implementation, root-cause debugging, review, validation, reusable learning capture, Pull Request / Merge Request handoff, plan grilling, and optional Unity Editor MCP automation.
